settings.heading: Troubleshoot by symptom
settings.subheading: Start with the symptom you see, take the shortest recovery step, and escalate only if the issue remains.

settings.heading: Troubleshooting by symptom and product behavior
settings.copy: Review the likely cause, try the most useful action, and move forward only if the symptom remains.

settings.title: Hub not recognized after plugging in
settings.copy: Check that the host USB-C port supports data, not just charging. Try a different port or a shorter cable. Reboot with the hub connected.

settings.title: External monitor shows no signal
settings.copy: Confirm your laptop supports DisplayPort Alt Mode over USB-C. Update display drivers and check the HDMI cable. Some hubs require power delivery to enable video output.

settings.title: Laptop charges slowly through the hub
settings.copy: Verify the charger wattage meets your laptop's requirement. Enable power delivery pass-through and plug the charger directly into the hub PD port.

settings.title: USB-A devices not detected on hub
settings.copy: Try a different USB-A port on the hub. Test the device directly on the laptop to confirm it works. Install the latest driver from the Downloads page if prompted.

settings.title: Gigabit Ethernet not connecting
settings.copy: Check the network cable and switch port. On macOS, open Network preferences and confirm the new adapter appears. Assign a manual IP if DHCP fails.

settings.title: SD card not appearing on desktop
settings.copy: Re-seat the card. Check Disk Utility (macOS) or Disk Management (Windows) to see if the volume needs to be mounted. Try a different card to rule out card failure.

settings.heading: Move to the next clear path
settings.copy: If the symptom points to a file, a guide, or direct help, take the next step without restarting the journey.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.copy: Open drivers and utilities when the issue points to software or tools.

settings.title: Manuals
settings.copy: Open the setup guide when the symptom points to the install path or a missed step.

settings.title: Get help now
settings.copy: Start a support request when guided troubleshooting still leaves one clear question open.

settings.heading: Still stuck after the guided step?
settings.body: Start one support request and include the product, symptom, and what you already tried.
